news.t: Natixis Investment Managers and Loomis Sayles Announce Launch of Natixis Loomis Sayles Focused Growth ETF, Managed by the $70B Loomis Sayles Growth Equity Strategies Team

holdings.infoBox: LSGR is an equity ETF with a total of 22 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 17.95%, Alphabet at 13.05%, Amazon.com at 7.93%, Meta Platforms at 7.88%, and Tesla at 7.39%.

overview.description: The Natixis Loomis Sayles Focused Growth ETF (LSGR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed, non-transparent fund that focuses on US-listed large-cap stocks but may include companies of any capitalization through a growth investment style. The fund utilizes the Natixis/NYSE non-transparent ETF model. LSGR was launched on Jun 29, 2023 and is issued by Natixis.

data.title: Natixis Investment Managers and Loomis Sayles Announce Launch of Natixis Loomis Sayles Focused Growth ETF, Managed by the $70B Loomis Sayles Growth Equity Strategies Team
